ModMetaData.name: ISEKAI RPG LEVELING
ModMetaData.author: Jelly Creative
ModMetaData.description:
ISEKAI RPG LEVELING SYSTEM - v1.1.5
Your pawns have been transported to the Rim... but they brought something special with them - the ability to level up like heroes from another world!
CORE FEATURES - RPG Stats: STR, DEX, VIT, INT, WIS, CHA - allocate stat points on level up - XP System: Gain XP from combat, crafting, research, social, and more - Rank System: F, E, D, C, B, A, S, SS, SSS ranks with unique bonuses - Combat Auras: High-rank pawns (B+) display colorful energy auras in combat - Mob Ranking: All creatures ranked by power - fight stronger foes for more XP - Mana Core Drops: Enemies drop valuable mana cores based on their rank - Rank Traits: Social bonuses and roleplay flavor based on power level - Psycast Integration: WIS affects neural heat, psychic sensitivity, and more
STAT EFFECTS - STR: Melee damage, carry capacity - VIT: Health regen, damage reduction, armor, rest rate - DEX: Move speed, dodge, accuracy - INT: Research speed, learning speed, work speed - WIS: Mental stability, medical skill, animal handling, psycast abilities - CHA: Social impact, trade prices, tame chance, arrest success
COMBAT AURAS (B-Rank and above) - B Rank: White/Silver - A Rank: Blue - S Rank: Gold - SS Rank: Orange/Red - SSS Rank: Violet/Purple
MANA CORE VALUES - Small Mana Core: 50 silver (F-E ranks) - Mana Core: 150 silver (D-C ranks) - Big Mana Core: 500 silver (B-A ranks) - Huge Mana Core: 1500 silver (S-SSS ranks)
COMPATIBILITY - Combat Extended, Vanilla Expanded, VPE compatible - Safe to add mid-save - Royalty DLC: Optional (adds psychic stat bonuses) - Ideology, Biotech, Anomaly: Fully compatible
REQUIREMENTS - Harmony
See Steam Workshop page for full details!
Made by Jelly Creative

li.description:
[h1]Isekai RPG Leveling System[/h1]
Your pawns have been transported to the Rim... but they brought something special with them - the ability to level up like heroes from another world!
[h2]Core Features[/h2] [list] [*] [b]RPG Stats System[/b] - STR, DEX, VIT, INT, WIS, CHA - allocate stat points on level up! [*] [b]XP and Leveling[/b] - Gain XP from combat, crafting, research, social, and more [*] [b]Rank System[/b] - F, E, D, C, B, A, S, SS, SSS ranks [*] [b]Rank Traits[/b] - Unique bonuses granted at certain ranks [*] [b]Stat Attribution Window[/b] - Beautiful UI to spend stat points with detailed tooltips for theorycraft [*] [b]Combat Auras[/b] - Show off your power with colorful auras based on rank [*] [b]VPE Integration and other mods[/b] - WIS stat affects psycast abilities [*] [b]Mob Ranking System[/b] - Enemies have ranks too! Fight stronger foes for more XP [*] [b]Mod Settings[/b] - Customize XP rates, stat points per level, aura appearance, and more [*] [b]Rank Titles[/b] - Awakened, Apprentice, Adventurer, Warrior, Champion, Hero, Legend, Monarch, Overlord [/list]
[h2]Stat Effects[/h2]
[b]STR (Strength)[/b] - Physical power and raw muscle [list] [*] Melee Damage (+2% per point) [*] Carry Capacity (+2% per point) [/list]
[b]VIT (Vitality)[/b] - Constitution and toughness [list] [*] Health Regeneration (+2% per point) [*] Toxic Resistance (+1% per point) [*] Incoming Damage Reduction (-1% per point) [*] Natural Armor: Sharp, Blunt, Heat (+0.5% per point) [*] Pain Shock Threshold (+1% per point) [*] Rest Rate (+1.5% per point) [*] Neural Heat Limit (shared with WIS) [/list]
[b]DEX (Dexterity)[/b] - Agility and precision [list] [*] Move Speed (+2% per point) [*] Melee Dodge Chance (+1% per point) [*] Shooting Accuracy (+1.5% per point) [*] Melee Hit Chance (+0.8% per point) [*] Aiming Delay (-1% per point) [/list]
[b]INT (Intelligence)[/b] - Mental acuity and learning [list] [*] Research Speed (+2% per point) [*] Work Speed (+2% per point) [*] Learning Speed (+2% per point) [*] Psychic Sensitivity (shared with WIS) [/list]
[b]WIS (Wisdom)[/b] - Insight and mental fortitude [list] [*] Mental Break Threshold (-1% per point, harder to break) [*] Meditation Focus Gain (+1.5% per point) [*] Medical Tend Quality (+1% per point) [*] Surgery Success Chance (+1.5% per point) [*] Train Animal Chance (+1.5% per point) [*] Animal Gather Yield (+1% per point) [*] Psychic Sensitivity (shared with INT) [*] Neural Heat Limit (shared with VIT) [*] Neural Heat Recovery (+1.5% per point) [*] Psyfocus Cost Reduction (-0.8% per point) [/list]
[b]CHA (Charisma)[/b] - Social influence and presence [list] [*] Social Impact (+1.5% per point) [*] Negotiation Ability (+1% per point) [*] Trade Price Improvement (+1.5% per point) [*] Tame Animal Chance (+1% per point) [*] Arrest Success Chance (+0.5% per point) [/list]
[h2]Combat Auras[/h2] High-rank pawns (B+) display impressive energy auras when in combat! Allows for quick visual identification of powerful allies and enemies on the battlefield. [list] [*] [b]B Rank[/b] - White/Silver aura [*] [b]A Rank[/b] - Blue aura [*] [b]S Rank[/b] - Gold aura [*] [b]SS Rank[/b] - Orange/Red aura [*] [b]SSS Rank[/b] - Violet/Purple aura [/list] Enemies and allies also display their auras when in combat!
[h2]XP System[/h2] Gain experience through various activities:
[b]Combat XP[/b] [list] [*] Kill XP scales with enemy rank (F: 30 XP to SSS: 2000 XP) [*] Elite enemies give +50% bonus XP [*] [b]Shared XP[/b]: When multiple pawns attack the same enemy, XP is distributed based on damage contribution (minimum 20% for participants) [*] Small XP bonus for dealing damage [/list]
[b]Work XP[/b] [list] [*] Crafting: 15 XP per task [*] Research: 15 XP per session [*] Building: 8 XP per structure [*] Medical/Tending: 35 XP [*] Surgery: 50 XP [*] Animal training: 10 XP [*] Harvesting: 5 XP [*] Mining: 5 XP [*] Cooking: 10 XP [*] Art creation: 20 XP [/list]
[b]Social and Other[/b] [list] [*] Successful social interactions: 5-15 XP [*] Recruiting prisoners: 25 XP [*] Taming animals: 15 XP [*] Meditation (psycasts): 8 XP per session [*] Using psycast abilities: XP based on entropy cost [/list]
[h2]Mob Ranking System[/h2] All creatures in the game are automatically assigned a rank based on their combat threat level:
[b]Creature Rank Examples[/b] [list] [*] [b]F-Rank (Harmless)[/b] - Squirrels, rats, chickens [*] [b]E-Rank (Weak)[/b] - Dogs, deer, small animals [*] [b]D-Rank (Common)[/b] - Camels, horses, boars [*] [b]C-Rank (Threatening)[/b] - Wolves, cougars [*] [b]B-Rank (Dangerous)[/b] - Bears, panthers [*] [b]A-Rank (Deadly)[/b] - Elephants, rhinoceros [*] [b]S-Rank (Legendary)[/b] - Thrumbos, megasloths [*] [b]SS-Rank (Alpha Beast)[/b] - Rare elite variants [*] [b]SSS-Rank (Apex Predator)[/b] - Extremely rare, godlike creatures [/list]
[b]Elite Creatures[/b] Creatures ranked B and above are considered Elite and display special titles based on their power level! These dangerous foes are marked with descriptive epithets to warn you of their strength. [list] [*] [b]B-Rank (Dangerous)[/b] - "Savage" or "Fierce" - 1.3x damage, 1.5x health, +10% armor [*] [b]A-Rank (Deadly)[/b] - "Ferocious" or "Brutal" - 1.6x damage, 2.0x health, +20% armor [*] [b]S-Rank (Legendary)[/b] - "Apex" or "Alpha" - 2.0x damage, 2.5x health, +35% armor [*] [b]SS-Rank (Alpha Beast)[/b] - "Mythic" or "Primordial" - 2.2x damage, 3.0x health, +45% armor [*] [b]SSS-Rank (Apex Predator)[/b] - "Legendary" or "Godlike" - 2.5x damage, 3.5x health, +50% armor [/list] Elite creatures also drop higher tier mana cores and give significantly more XP when killed! Elite title display can be toggled in mod settings.
[b]Rank Stat Bonuses[/b] Higher rank creatures are significantly stronger: [list] [*] Damage: F (0.7x) to SSS (2.5x) [*] Health: F (0.7x) to SSS (3.5x) [*] Armor: F (-10%) to SSS (+50%) [*] Speed: F (0.9x) to SSS (1.4x) [/list]
[h2]Mana Core Drops[/h2] Creatures drop mana cores when killed, based on their rank:
[b]Small Mana Core (50 silver)[/b] [list] [*] F-Rank: Low chance, 1 core [*] E-Rank: Medium chance, 1-2 cores [/list]
[b]Mana Core (150 silver)[/b] [list] [*] D-Rank: Low chance, 1 core [*] C-Rank: 50% chance, 1-2 cores [/list]
[b]Big Mana Core (500 silver)[/b] [list] [*] B-Rank: 40% chance, 1 core [*] A-Rank: 70% chance, 1-2 cores [/list]
[b]Huge Mana Core (1500 silver)[/b] [list] [*] S-Rank: 50% chance, 1 core [*] SS-Rank: 80% chance, 1-2 cores [*] SSS-Rank: 100% chance, 1-3 cores [/list]
[h2]Guild Quest System[/h2] The Adventurer's Guild delivers daily hunt contracts! Accept quests to hunt powerful creatures for XP, silver bounties, and valuable loot.
[b]Hunt Quests (F-D Rank)[/b] [list] [*] Target spawns on your home map [*] Quick encounters for beginners [*] Immediate combat engagement [/list]
[b]Expedition Quests (B-A Rank)[/b] [list] [*] Pack hunts on world map sites [*] B-Rank: 3-5 creatures | A-Rank: 5-8 creatures [*] All pack members must be killed to complete [*] Form a caravan and bring your hunting party! [/list]
[b]Raid Quests (S-SSS Rank)[/b] [list] [*] Legendary single boss encounters [*] World map expeditions (15-50 tiles away) [*] Endgame challenges with massive rewards [/list]
[b]Quest Rewards[/b] [list] [*] XP based on creature rank [*] Silver bounties (50-2000+ silver) [*] Random loot: weapons, armor, components, valuables [*] Reward quality scales with quest difficulty [/list]
[h2]Rank Traits (Roleplay)[/h2] Your pawns receive a trait based on their rank that affects social interactions:
[b]F-Rank[/b] "The weakest classification. Others look down on them with pity or contempt." [list] [*] Beauty: -0.5 | Social Impact: -30% | Trade Prices: -10% [*] Market Value: 0.5x | More likely to be targeted in social fights [/list]
[b]E-Rank[/b] "Below average but not completely worthless. Often overlooked." [list] [*] Beauty: -0.25 | Social Impact: -15% [*] Market Value: 0.75x [/list]
[b]D-Rank[/b] "Thoroughly average. Neither stands out nor falls behind." [list] [*] No bonuses or penalties - baseline [/list]
[b]C-Rank[/b] "A competent person above the common masses. Commands modest respect." [list] [*] Beauty: +0.25 | Social Impact: +10% [*] Market Value: 1.5x [/list]
[b]B-Rank[/b] "A skilled veteran worthy of respect. Their reputation precedes them." [list] [*] Beauty: +0.5 | Social Impact: +25% | Trade Prices: +5% [*] Market Value: 2.5x | Less likely to be in social fights [/list]
[b]A-Rank[/b] "Among the finest in existence. Their presence commands attention." [list] [*] Beauty: +1.0 | Social Impact: +50% | Arrest: +15% [*] Market Value: 5x [/list]
[b]S-Rank[/b] "A hero of incredible power. Their name is spoken with reverence." [list] [*] Beauty: +1.5 | Social Impact: +75% | Arrest: +25% [*] Market Value: 10x [/list]
[b]SS-Rank[/b] "A demigod walking among mortals. Entire nations would pay any price for their loyalty." [list] [*] Beauty: +2.0 | Social Impact: +100% | Arrest: +40% [*] Market Value: 25x [/list]
[b]SSS-Rank[/b] "The absolute apex of existence. A god among mortals. Kingdoms would fall to possess them." [list] [*] Beauty: +3.0 | Social Impact: +150% | Arrest: +60% [*] Market Value: 100x | Almost never involved in social fights [/list]
[h2]Psycast Integration[/h2] Works with vanilla psycasts! WIS affects: [list] [*] Psychic Sensitivity [*] Neural Heat Limit [*] Neural Heat Recovery [*] Psyfocus Cost [/list]
[h2]Mod Settings[/h2] [list] [*] XP multiplier [*] Stat points per level [*] Aura opacity and size [*] Enable/disable floating panels [*] And more! [/list]
[h2]Compatibility[/h2] [list] [*] Compatible with Combat Extended [*] Compatible with Vanilla Expanded mods [*] Compatible with Vanilla Psycasts Expanded [*] Safe to add mid-save [/list]
[h2]Requirements[/h2] [list] [*] Harmony (required) [/list]
[hr][/hr] Made by Jelly Creative
